__comment: Goldpath.Campaign panel (campaign RFC section 7). Datasource: Prometheus scraping the OTel collector. The PACER RUN's progress lives on the goldpath-jobs dashboard (the pacer is a run); this board owns the governor story: released rate vs the TPS ceiling, in-flight vs its ceiling, remaining/ETA, window state, outcome split.
title: Goldpath Campaign — governor & progress

panels.title: Release rate (items/s) vs the configured TPS — the pacer's precision IS this line (runbook §1)
In-flight per campaign — pinned at MaxInFlight means consumers lag the pacer (runbook §2)
Remaining per campaign — the slope is the honest ETA
Outcomes (per hour) — failures climbing is a provider conversation (runbook §3)
Window-closed ticks (per hour) — nonzero outside the send window is CORRECT; inside it, the timezone is wrong (runbook §4)
